title: Slime Origin Remastered
description: This is a remastered version of the Slime Origin for the Origins Mod. This mod adds an origin named the Slimecician that makes the player smaller instead of dying and various other fun additions.
body:
This is a remastered version of the Slime Origin (originally by totalelipse) for the Origins Mod.

Requires FabricAPI, Pehkui, and Origins.


Powers:
- Improved Jump Height
- Launch yourself into the air
- No Fall Damage
- Can Summon Slime
- Shrink to half your size (and max health) instead of dying
- Bounce on any block like it was a slime block.
- Burn in hot biomes (Anything with a temperature score 1.0)
- Reduced Movement Speed
 

How To Install:
- Download Fabric
- Run Fabric Setup with the Minecraft Launcher closed
- Download Fabric API, Origins, and Pehkui and put them in your .minecraft\mods folder
- Download Slime Origin Remastered and put it in your .minecraft\mods folder
